name: Apple Oat Pancakes
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium bowl, combine the rolled oats and water. Let stand for 5 minutes.
2. Heat a large nonstick skillet or griddle to medium-high heat (375°F).
3. Grease lightly with oil. Add the remaining ingredients to the rolled oats mixture and stir just until all ingredients are moistened. The batter will be thin.
4. For each pancake, pour about 1/4 cup of batter into the hot skillet.
5. Cook for 1 to 1 1/2 minutes, turning when edges look cooked and bubbles begin to break on the surface.
6. Continue cooking for another 1 to 1 1/2 minutes or until golden brown.
7. Serve with syrup if desired. Makes 15 (4-inch) pancakes, serving 5.
Note: Use low-fat Bisquick if you prefer.
